MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Discover Bank FKA Greenwood Trust Company's Hearing On Claim Of Exemption of Maria R. Clemente is Granted. The levying officer shall withhold $ 150.00 per pay period. Order signed. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.
